name: Scholastic Aptitude Test (1926) - the original first SAT
decision_reason: US public domain (pre-1931 publication). No usage restrictions.

name: Examination Questions in Mathematics, Third Series (1911-1915)
publisher: College Entrance Examination Board / Ginn and Company
license: Public domain (US): published before 1931; Internet Archive rights statement NOT_IN_COPYRIGHT
decision_reason: US public domain (pre-1931 publication); Internet Archive offers unrestricted download.

name: Examination Questions in Mathematics, Fourth Series (1916-1920)
publisher: College Entrance Examination Board / Ginn and Company
decision_reason: US public domain (pre-1931 publication); unrestricted download.

name: Examination Questions in History (c. 1915)
publisher: College Entrance Examination Board / Ginn and Company
license: Public domain (US): Internet Archive rights statement NOT_IN_COPYRIGHT
decision_reason: Explicit NOT_IN_COPYRIGHT rights statement plus pre-1931 publication.

name: Examination Questions in History, 1901-1905
license: Public domain (US): published before 1931 (Google Books scan)

name: Wikibooks: SAT Study Guide
decision_reason: Valid open license (CC BY-SA), but content is nearly empty - no actual practice questions. Kept in registry for completeness; deprioritized for collection.

name: College Board Official SAT Paper Practice Tests (PDF)
license: Copyright College Board, all rights reserved. Free download; personal, non-commercial educational use only; redistribution and online re-posting prohibited without written permission.
decision_reason: Free and official, but NOT openly licensed. Downloading for personal educational use is consistent with College Board terms; redistribution of the PDFs or extracted questions is not. Requires explicit project-owner sign-off before collection, and outputs must stay private.

name: College Board SAT Suite Educator Question Bank
license: Copyright College Board. Terms explicitly prohibit uploading, posting, caching, reproducing, or modifying any portion of the SAT Suite Question Bank without express written permission.
decision_reason: Terms explicitly prohibit exactly what this pipeline would do (caching/reproducing question bank items). Official and free does not mean collectible.

name: Khan Academy Official SAT Practice
publisher: Khan Academy (content owned by College Board)
license: Khan Academy ToS: personal non-commercial use only; scraping/automated extraction prohibited; AI/ML training use prohibited. SAT items remain College Board copyright.
decision_reason: ToS explicitly prohibits scraping and automated extraction; underlying SAT content is College Board copyright.

name: CrackSAT.net practice test collection
license: No valid license. Site redistributes College Board copyrighted practice tests without evident authorization.
decision_reason: Unauthorized redistribution of copyrighted College Board materials. Collecting from it would launder infringing copies into the pipeline.

name: OpenSAT (GitHub question databank + API)
license: Repository code is open source, but the license of the question CONTENT is unclear and provenance is unverifiable (community-submitted and AI-generated items; risk of derivation from College Board copyrighted questions).
decision_reason: A code license does not license the question content. Provenance of items is unverifiable and may derive from copyrighted College Board material; AI-generated items also lack quality assurance.

name: 10 SATs: actual and complete Scholastic Aptitude Tests (1983+ book scans)
license: In copyright. Internet Archive access is controlled digital lending only (borrow), not free download.
decision_reason: Under copyright (published 1983); lending access does not grant collection or reproduction rights.

name: Real SAT Subject Tests (book scan)
license: In copyright. Controlled digital lending only.
decision_reason: Under copyright; lending access does not grant collection rights.
